description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: Find an in-office teeth whitening treatment priced under $400 with a listed duration between 60 and 90 minutes, choose the cheapest option, and request an appointment for the next available Thursday at 3:00 PM as a new patient.

tasks.instruction: Compare porcelain and composite veneer options for treating 4 teeth, select the material where the total cost for 4 teeth is lower and still under $3,000, then use the financing tools to find a 0% interest or standard plan with estimated monthly payments under $150 and save or email that plan.

tasks.instruction: Locate the clinic nearest to ZIP code 94103 that is open on Sundays within a 15-mile radius, then use its emergency section to submit an emergency contact form for a broken tooth requesting contact within about 2 hours.

tasks.instruction: Filter the dentist directory to female cosmetic dentists with at least 8 years of experience and an average rating of 4.7 or higher, then book an in-person consultation at 10:00 AM on the earliest available date within the next 14 days with the top-rated matching dentist.

tasks.instruction: Complete the smile assessment, then on the recommended treatments page filter to options with an estimated cost under $2,500 and a treatment duration under 6 months, choose the treatment with the highest patient satisfaction rating, and request that a cost estimate be emailed to you.

tasks.instruction: Find a new-patient special offer that includes an exam, X-rays, and cleaning for under $199 and is valid during March 2026, then use it to request an appointment at any location on a Tuesday that month at 9:00 AM.

target_names: New Patient Exam, X-Rays & Cleaning – $149 March Special

tasks.instruction: Use the Invisalign financing calculator to set a total treatment cost of $4,800, filter to 0% interest plans, then adjust the term until the estimated monthly payment is at or below $200 and submit an application request for that plan.

tasks.instruction: In the smile gallery, filter to composite bonding cases on front teeth completed in 1–2 visits, save the first two results to your favorites, then from your favorites submit a request for a similar result based on the second saved case.
